name: M5 SensorCast
tagline: M5Stack sensor values on your lens.
description: Technical demo. Reads M5Stack Core2 sensors (accelerometer, gyroscope, IMU temperature, battery, touch, RTC) over Wi-Fi (WebSocket) and shows them on the Even G2 lens. Tap = next page (ACCEL / GYRO / POWER / TOUCH), scroll up = previous page.
author: yuisho

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Receives sensor data from the M5Stack over the local Wi-Fi via WebSocket.
